svg.title: Three human intervention modes
svg.desc: Three modes compared along a does-the-system-wait axis. Optional enrichment never blocks, the human branches off while the main flow continues. Approval gate blocks and waits up to 60 seconds, then either continues on approval or finalizes provisional on timeout. Open mic is async: an observer interjection stays pending until an agent addresses it, never blocking on the clock.
svg.text: optional waits for no one · gate waits on the clock · open mic waits on an agent
